title: Weiyirot Spice Grinder Stone Grinder Hand Mortar Pestle Set, Spices Mortar Pestle Set, Granite Mortar for Home Kitchen Apothecaries Pharmacies(Wood Grain)
description:
About this item
PREMIUM QUALITY - This mortar and pestle set is made of high-quality solid thick PP plastic, ensuring durability and longevity. The premium material is eco-friendly and non-toxic, providing a safe and reliable option for your culinary and medicinal needs.
COMFORT TO USE - The manual operation of this mortar and pestle set makes grinding garlic and ginger into a minced state or powder a breeze. The ergonomic design of the set ensures a comfortable and secure grip, even during prolonged use. The smooth surface of the mortar and pestle won't hurt your hands, ensuring a pleasant grinding experience.
MULTI PURPOSE - This versatile set can be used to easily pulverize and crush a variety of ingredients, including garlic, ginger, vanilla, pepper, nut fruit, coffee beans, and various spices. Adding freshly ground ingredients to your cooking will enhance the flavor and provide the best taste. Additionally, this set is widely used in pharmacies and apothecaries, allowing you to powder pills for optimal ingestion.
EASY TO CLEAN - Cleaning this set is simple and hassle-free. We do not recommend using a dishwasher, as the high heat may potentially crack the material. Instead, simply rinse the set with warm water and mild dish soap to remove any residue, making it ready for your next use.
PROFESSIONAL SUPPORT - Our store dedicates to provide professional products with considerate service. For any product problem, please don't hesitate to email us. We are ready to offer you a satisfactory solution at any time.
